scripts.build: npm run build:m3u && rm -rf release && mkdir -p release && cp -R node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app 'release/My IPTV.app' && rm -rf 'release/My IPTV.app/Contents/Resources/default_app.asar' && mkdir -p 'release/My IPTV.app/Contents/Resources/app' && cp main.js preload.js index.html style.css app.js channels.json channels.m3u package.json 'release/My IPTV.app/Contents/Resources/app/' && cp -R lib 'release/My IPTV.app/Contents/Resources/app/lib' && cp -R node_modules/hls.js 'release/My IPTV.app/Contents/Resources/app/node_modules/' && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :CFBundleDisplayName My IPTV' 'release/My IPTV.app/Contents/Info.plist' && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :CFBundleName My IPTV' 'release/My IPTV.app/Contents/Info.plist' && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :CFBundleIdentifier com.myiptv.app' 'release/My IPTV.app/Contents/Info.plist' && ln -sf Electron 'release/My IPTV.app/Contents/MacOS/My IPTV'
